business_ideas.idea: Weight loss via blood glucose monitoring with financial incentives.
Autonomous robots for skyscraper window cleaning (drone-based)
Roll up fragmented window washing industry via consolidation.
Roll up dentistry practices across regions for efficiency gains.
Senior care facility aggregation via bed expansion and upsells.
Do Not Pay app: fight parking tickets, cancel free trials automatically.
Do Not Call registry automation with spam lawsuit generation.
Expand chess tutoring academy (my chess tutor) to 5000+ students.
Restaurant bathroom supply co-op vs Aramark; lower prices or better service.
Modern marketplace for collectibles (coins, posters, comics, wine).
First-dibs auction system for unreleased products and media.

predictions.text: Online auctions and marketplaces are among the top 2-3 business models.
Collectors market will be much bigger in 30 years due to nostalgia.
Rope-access drone window washing will be competitive but viable.
Rollup playbook works across fragmented services (window wash, dentistry).
